mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_NAME FROM TBL_JOB_CATEGORY WHERE DEPTH = 1 ORDER BY CATEGORY_ID ASC

WITH company_base AS ( SELECT C.fk_memberid AS memberId, C.company_name AS companyName, MAX(CI.company_type) AS companyType, MAX(PR.region_name) AS parentRegionName, MAX(R.region_name) AS regionName, COUNT(DISTINCT JP.job_id) AS openJobCount, NVL(SUM(JP.view_count), 0) AS totalViewCount, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN JA.application_status = 0 AND JA.applied_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalApplyCount FROM tbl_job_posting JP JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_job_application JA ON JA.fk_job_id = JP.job_id WHERE JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) GROUP BY C.fk_memberid, C.company_name ), score_base AS ( SELECT CB.*, MAX(CB.totalViewCount) OVER () AS maxViewCount, MAX(CB.totalApplyCount) OVER () AS maxApplyCount FROM company_base CB ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT memberId AS "memberId", companyName AS "companyName", companyType AS "companyType", parentRegionName AS "parentRegionName", regionName AS "regionName", openJobCount AS "openJobCount", totalViewCount AS "totalViewCount", totalApplyCount AS "totalApplyCount", ROUND( ( CASE WHEN maxApplyCount > 0 THEN (totalApplyCount / maxApplyCount) * 100 ELSE 0 END ) * 0.7 + ( CASE WHEN maxViewCount > 0 THEN (totalViewCount / maxViewCount) * 100 ELSE 0 END ) * 0.3 ) AS "hotScore" FROM score_base ORDER BY 9 DESC, 8 DESC, 7 DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT b.banner_id AS "bannerId", b.fk_memberid AS "fkMemberId", b.fk_job_id AS "fkJobId", b.title AS "title", b.image_file_id AS "imageFileId", TO_CHAR(b.start_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startAt", TO_CHAR(b.end_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endAt", b.status AS "status", f.file_url AS "fileUrl", f.original_filename AS "originalFilename", j.title AS "jobTitle" FROM tbl_banner b JOIN tbl_job_posting j ON j.job_id = b.fk_job_id LEFT JOIN tbl_image_file f ON f.file_id = b.image_file_id WHERE b.status = '승인완료' AND b.image_file_id IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(b.start_at) AND TRUNC(b.end_at) ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.banner_id DESC
